call_transcript: Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? Customer: Good, thanks. Agent: Great! So, we're pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%.  Is that something you'd be interested in discussing? Customer: Well, I'm thinking about consolidating some debt. Agent: Excellent! That's a very common use for our loans.  We can definitely help with that. What kind of debt are we looking at? Customer: Credit card debt, mostly. About 8 grand. Agent: Okay, perfect.  So, with the $10,000 Personal Loan at 8.99%, you could pay off that credit card debt and have some extra for, you know, emergencies. The monthly payments would be around $198.  Does that sound manageable? Customer: Hmm, that's… actually pretty good. What are the terms? Agent: It's a 60-month term.  No prepayment penalties.  We can get the paperwork started today if you'd like. Customer: Okay, let's do it.

Agent: Hello Mr. Miller? This is Sarah with Financial Freedom. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. Customer: Where did you get my number? I didn't ask for this. Agent: Sir, we… uh… we have a list of pre-approved customers. We are pre-approving you for a $5,000 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 19.99%. Customer: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! Agent: Well, sir, it depends on your credit score… Customer: Look, I'm retired. I don't need another credit card. And frankly, I'm not happy you called me.  Just take me off your list. Agent: Okay, sir. I understand. I'll make a note of that. Have a good day. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Secure Finance. I'm calling regarding a referral from Northwest Credit Union.  They mentioned you might be interested in a personal loan. Customer: Oh, yeah, I spoke with someone there. I'm looking at renovating my bathroom. Agent: Fantastic! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $20,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%.  What's the estimated cost of the renovation? Customer: Around 18,000. Agent: Okay, so a $20,000 loan gives you some wiggle room. The monthly payments would be approximately $375.  We have several term options, from 36 to 72 months. Customer: 72 months sounds good.  What are the fees? Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $150.  And, of course, the monthly interest.  We can waive the origination fee if you enroll in autopay. Customer: Hmm, okay. Autopay sounds fine.  So, $375 a month, plus the interest… and no origination fee? Agent: Exactly!  We can get the application started right away.  Do you have your social security number handy?

Agent: Hello Mr. Brown? This is Lisa from Premier Financial. We're offering… Customer: (Interrupting) Look, you guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! Agent: Sir, we… we have a list of potential customers… We are pre-approving you for a $2,500 Signature Credit Card at 17.99%... Customer: (Yelling) I said NO! Stop calling me! This is harassment! I want to be removed from your list *immediately*! *click*

Agent: Hi Maria, this is John from Capital One. I see you recently filled out a form on our website regarding a personal loan.  How are you today? Customer: I'm alright, thank you.  I'm thinking about getting a new roof. Agent: A new roof, excellent! That's a great investment. We are pre-approving you for a $7,500 Personal Loan at a rate of 9.49%.  Do you have a quote for the roof yet? Customer: Yes, I got one for $7,000. Agent: Perfect. So, the $7,500 loan would cover the roof and give you a little extra. The monthly payments would be around $150.  We have flexible repayment terms. Customer: That sounds… reasonable.  I need to think about it.  Could you send me some information by email? Agent: Absolutely! I'll send you a detailed breakdown of the loan terms, including the APR and repayment schedule.  Is your email address still maria.rodriguez@email.com? Customer: Yes, that's correct. Thank you.

Agent: Hello Mr. Lee? This is Emily with First Choice Bank. We're offering a… Customer: (Interrupting) I'm unemployed. I don't want a credit card.  Where did you get my number? Agent: Sir, we are pre-approving you for a $1,000 Signature Credit Card at 24.99%... Customer: (Scoffs) Seriously? You think I can afford that?  This is a waste of my time. *click*

Agent: Hi Linda, this is Kevin from Global Lending. I'm calling regarding a referral from your financial advisor at Horizon Investments.  They mentioned you were considering a home improvement project. Customer: Yes, I am. I want to remodel my kitchen. Agent: Excellent! We can definitely help with that. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.99%. What's the estimated cost of the remodel? Customer: Around $12,000, but I want to have some buffer for unexpected expenses. Agent: That's smart. So, the $15,000 loan gives you that flexibility. The monthly payments would be approximately $285. We offer terms from 36 to 84 months. Customer: What are the fees? Agent: There's a $200 application fee, and a $10 monthly servicing fee.  We also have an optional credit life insurance policy for $10 a month. Customer: Hmm, the servicing fee… is that negotiable? Agent: Unfortunately, the $10 servicing fee is standard on all our personal loans. However, we can waive the $200 application fee if you provide direct deposit authorization. Customer: Okay, that sounds good. I'll do direct deposit.  So, $285 a month, plus the insurance if I want it… Agent: Exactly! We can get the application started right away. I'll need your social security number and date of birth…

Agent: Hello Mr. Wilson? This is Brenda from SecureCard. We're offering a special… Customer: (Interrupting) Hello? Could you speak up, dear? I didn't quite catch that. Agent: (Louder) Hello Mr. Wilson, this is Brenda from SecureCard. We are pre-approving you for a $500 Signature Credit Card at an interest rate of 21.99%. Customer: 21.99? What does that even *mean*? Is that a lot? Agent: It's the annual percentage rate, sir. It's the cost of borrowing money. Customer: Borrowing money… I don't need to borrow money. I just want to pay for my groceries. Agent: This card can help you with that, sir. It offers rewards points on everyday purchases. Customer: Rewards points? Oh, my. That sounds complicated. I think I'll just stick with my cash. Thank you, dear. Agent: Okay, sir. Have a good evening.

Agent: Hi Ashley, this is Mark from Prime Finance. I see you submitted an application for a personal loan on our website.  How are you doing this evening? Customer: Good, thanks. I'm looking to consolidate some student loan debt. Agent: Excellent! That's a very smart move. We are pre-approving you for a $30,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 6.99%.  What's the total amount of your student loan debt? Customer: About $28,000. Agent: Okay, so the $30,000 loan would cover that and give you a little extra. The monthly payments would be around $550. We have terms from 36 to 84 months. Customer: I've been looking at SoFi and Earnest as well. Their rates seem competitive. Agent: That's a good point. SoFi and Earnest are good lenders. However, our rate of 6.99% is currently lower than their advertised rates for borrowers with your credit profile. Plus, we offer a 0.25% discount if you enroll in autopay. Customer: Hmm, that's interesting. What are the fees? Agent: There's a $150 origination fee, but we can waive that if you enroll in autopay. There are no prepayment penalties. Customer: Okay, so 6.99% with autopay, no origination fee, and no prepayment penalties… That sounds pretty good.  What's the next step? Agent: Great! I can send you a secure link to complete the application online. It should only take about 10 minutes.  I'll also need your social security number and date of birth to verify your identity…

Agent: Hello Mr. Thompson? This is Sarah with Liberty Financial. We're offering a… Customer: (Interrupting) Where did you get my number? I never signed up for anything. Agent: Sir, we are pre-approving you for a $1,500 Signature Credit Card at 18.49%... Customer: (Scoffs) No, thank you. Don't call me again. *click*
